ohtani.title: Andujar, King lead Padres to a win 1-0 over Dodgers
ohtani.blurb: Miguel Andujar crushes a home run and Michael King strikes out nine in seven scoreless, leading the Padres to a 1-0 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Yelich, Bauers combine for six RBI's in Brewers' win
imanaga.blurb: Christian Yelich and Jake Bauers each homer and combine for six RBI's, powering the Brewers to a 9-3 win

suzuki.title: Yelich, Bauers combine for six RBI's in Brewers' win
suzuki.blurb: Christian Yelich and Jake Bauers each homer and combine for six RBI's, powering the Brewers to a 9-3 win

yoshida.title: Sonny Gray, Willson Contreras lead Red Sox to 3-1 win
yoshida.blurb: Sonny Gray strikes out nine and Willson Contreras hits a two-run home run to fuel the Red Sox to a 3-1 win over the Royals

okamoto.title: Jazz Chisholm Jr. hits go-ahead homer in Yankees' win
okamoto.blurb: Cody Bellinger and Jazz Chisholm Jr. each hit two-run home runs in the 7th inning to lead the Yankees to a 7-6 victory over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Colt Emerson, Bryan Woo lead the Mariners to 6-1 win
murakami.blurb: Colt Emerson crushes a three-run home run and Bryan Woo strikes out eight batters over six innings to lead the Mariners to a 6-1 win over the White Sox

matsui.title: Gavin Sheets crushes two homers in Padres' win
matsui.blurb: Gavin Sheets has a huge night in Seattle, going 3-3 with two home runs and a double in the Padres' 8-3 victory over the Mariners
